Plaintiff Andrew Meehan'S Motion To Compel Defendant Viking Property Services' Further Responses To Special Interogatories And For An Award Of Sanctions
Off Calendar May-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kristen Ross, Esq. (415-835-6777) for Andrew Meehan, plaintiff and moving party / Chantel Lafrades, Esq. (415-524-4300) for Viking Property Services, defendant and opposing party

Pursuant to the tentative ruling, Court orders both sides to meet and confer at 9am re plaintiff's motion. At 9:50am in open court, plaintiff's counsel reports to the Court that plaintiff has proposal to defendant but there are no resolutions reached because defendant's counsel claims having no authority to decide on the issues. Court admonishes the defendant's counsel and its law firm for being unprepared to engage in the "meet and confer" discussion ordered by the Court. In the future when the counsel's law firm sends another counsel without authority to discuss the case, sanctions will be imposed against the law firm. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: Plaintiff Andrew Meehan'S Motion To Compel Defendant Viking Property Services' Further Responses To Special Interogatories is GRANTED and Request for Sanctions in the amount of $650.00 is GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Peter J. Busch, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Mtn To Compel Deft'S Further Responses To Special Interoggs
